title: Charred Gooey Uruguayan Dum Toast
description: A sweet and savory Uruguayan dish featuring charred toast topped with a gooey dum and perfect for a date night.
instructions: Slice the whole wheat bread into 1-inch thick slices and toast until lightly browned.
While the bread is toasting, melt the unsalted butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the vanilla extract and sea salt to the melted butter and stir to combine.
Once the bread is toasted, brush the melted butter mixture onto each slice.
Top each slice of bread with a Uruguayan dulce de leche dumpling and place under the broiler for 1-2 minutes, or until the dumplings are charred and gooey.
Sprinkle a sprig of fresh thyme over the top of each slice and serve immediately.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients to make additional servings.
